subject: docs(claude-md): fix documentation inaccuracies found during doc audit
body:
- Rename "Structured" to "Guided" in all user-facing label references
  (Content Tab toggle, Project Status, Tab Details) to match actual UI
- Update freeformText state shape: now array-of-blocks per cell (with
  id, spacerAbove/Below, lineAbove/Below) instead of single object
- Add useFocusTrap.js to Architecture section (was missing)
- Add note that textMode state value remains 'structured' for compat

Tags: docs, accuracy, claude-md
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: code-review-sweep
